# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  IAM role for Lambda functions with least-privilege access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch.
  Uses specific actions instead of wildcard (*) to follow least-privilege principle.

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    Description: Environment name for resource scoping
  ProjectName:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9-]+$'
    MaxLength: 32
    Description: Project name used for resource naming and scoping
  S3BucketArn:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:s3:::[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.\-]{1,61}[a-z0-9]$'
    Description: ARN of the specific S3 bucket this role needs access to
  DynamoDBTableArn:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:dynamodb:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:table/[A-Za-z0-9_.\-]+$'
    Description: ARN of the specific DynamoDB table this role needs access to
  SQSQueueArn:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:sqs:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+$'
    Description: ARN of the specific SQS queue this role needs access to
  SNSTopicArn:
    Type: String
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:sns:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+$'
    Description: ARN of the specific SNS topic this role needs access to

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-execution-role'
      Description: !Sub 'Least-privilege Lambda execution role for ${ProjectName} in ${Environment}'
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref ProjectName
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  CloudWatchLogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-cloudwatch-logs'
      Description: Allows Lambda to write logs to CloudWatch Logs
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLogGroupCreation
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: AllowLogWriting
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
              - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/aws/lambda/${ProjectName}-${Environment}-*:log-stream:*'

  CloudWatchMetricsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-cloudwatch-metrics'
      Description: Allows Lambda to publish custom metrics to CloudWatch
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPutMetrics
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'cloudwatch:PutMetricData'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                cloudwatch:namespace: !Sub '${ProjectName}/${Environment}'

  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-s3-access'
      Description: Scoped S3 read/write access for Lambda functions
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowS3ObjectReadWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
              - 's3:GetObjectVersion'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${S3BucketArn}/*'
          - Sid: AllowS3BucketListing
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
            Resource:
              - !Ref S3BucketArn
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${S3BucketArn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: 'aws:kms'

  DynamoDBAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-dynamodb-access'
      Description: Scoped DynamoDB access for Lambda functions
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowDynamoDBReadWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'dynamodb:GetItem'
              - 'dynamodb:PutItem'
              - 'dynamodb:UpdateItem'
              - 'dynamodb:DeleteItem'
              - 'dynamodb:Query'
              - 'dynamodb:Scan'
              - 'dynamodb:BatchGetItem'
              - 'dynamodb:BatchWriteItem'
              - 'dynamodb:ConditionCheckItem'
            Resource:
              - !Ref DynamoDBTableArn
              - !Sub '${DynamoDBTableArn}/index/*'

  SQSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-sqs-access'
      Description: Scoped SQS access for Lambda functions
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSQSReadWrite
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
              - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueAttributes'
              - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
            Resource:
              - !Ref SQSQueueArn

  SNSAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-sns-access'
      Description: Scoped SNS publish access for Lambda functions
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'sns:Publish'
            Resource:
              - !Ref SNSTopicArn

Outputs:
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${ProjectName}-${Environment}-lambda-role-arn'
  LambdaExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda execution role
    Value: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
